name: Mountain America Credit Union - Las Vegas: Lake Mead Boulevard Branch
description_short: Mountain America Credit Union's Las Vegas Lake Mead Boulevard branch offers comprehensive banking services including checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and wealth management for personal and business members.
description_long:
Mountain America Credit Union is a credit union with a branch location in Las Vegas at the Lake Mead Boulevard address. As a credit union, it operates as a member-owned financial cooperative rather than a traditional bank, offering deposit accounts and lending products to eligible members. The organization has established a significant online presence and multiple physical locations across Nevada and beyond.

The credit union provides a full suite of consumer banking products including multiple checking account tiers (MyStyle Rewards Checking, MyFree Checking, Student Checking, MyExpress), savings accounts, certificates of deposit, money market accounts, and retirement accounts (IRAs, 401(k) options). On the lending side, they offer vehicle financing (auto, RV, boat, motorcycle, ATV, and other specialty vehicles), mortgage products (conventional, FHA, first-time homebuyer, construction, refinance, and reverse mortgages), home equity loans and HELOCs, personal loans, balance transfer options, and debt consolidation. They also issue credit cards with various features including rewards, low-rate, cash-back, and alumni-branded cards.

What distinguishes Mountain America is its comprehensive digital banking ecosystem, including mobile deposit, bill pay, Zelle integration, credit score monitoring, and CreditLock fraud protection. They also offer wealth management services through LPL Financial, with guided portfolios and retirement planning consultations. Their business banking division provides specialized services including SBA loans, commercial real estate financing, cash management, payment processing, and payroll solutions. The organization emphasizes financial education through partnerships like Banzai and GreenPath Financial Wellness.

As a credit union, membership eligibility may apply depending on geographic location or employer affiliation. The breadth of services is substantial, but actual rates and terms would need to be verified directly with the branch. Like many financial institutions, some premium services (wealth management consultations, financial guidance) may require account minimums or membership levels not detailed on the public website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Full-service banking with checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, and money market accounts under one institution
Comprehensive vehicle financing including specialty options (RV, boat, ATV, motorcycle, watercraft, snowmobile)
Multiple home loan products including FHA, construction, jumbo, reverse mortgages, and refinancing options
Integrated digital banking with mobile deposit, bill pay, Zelle, credit score monitoring, and CreditLock
Dedicated business banking division with SBA loans, commercial real estate, and payroll services
Wealth management and retirement planning services through LPL Financial partnership
Financial education programs including Banzai gaming platform and GreenPath wellness partnership
Current promotional offer: 3% cash bonus for balance transfers to Mountain America credit cards
cons: Credit union membership eligibility requirements may restrict access for some consumers (not specified on website)
No mention of specific APR ranges or rate transparency for loans and credit cards on branch page
Wealth management and financial guidance services appear to require separate scheduling and consultations
Limited information about minimum account balances or fees for various account types on the branch page
Premium services distinction unclear—unclear which services require higher membership tiers or account minimums
best_for: Consumers seeking comprehensive banking with checking, savings, lending, and investment services in one institution
Vehicle buyers financing specialty purchases like RVs, boats, motorcycles, or ATVs with specialized loan programs
Small business owners and entrepreneurs needing SBA loans, commercial real estate financing, and business banking
Homebuyers seeking multiple mortgage options including FHA, construction loans, and reverse mortgages
diagnosis: Mountain America Credit Union's Lake Mead Boulevard branch is best for consumers seeking a full-service credit union offering integrated banking, lending, and investment services, particularly those financing vehicles, purchasing homes, or managing small businesses. The main caveat is that credit union membership eligibility may apply, and specific rate information, fees, and minimum balance requirements are not detailed on the public branch page—contact directly for current terms.
